# INC-YYYYMMDD-title

## Summary

What happened?

## Impact

Who or what was affected, and how severely?

## Detection

How was the incident detected?

## Response

What was done to stabilize, mitigate, or recover?

## Recovery

How was recovery confirmed?

## Timeline

- YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM TZ - Event

## Root Cause / Contributing Factors

What system, process, information, or environmental factors contributed?

## What Went Well

- Item

## What Went Wrong

- Item

## Action Items

| Action | Owner | Verification |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Action item | Owner | How completion will be verified |

## Follow-up Verification

What evidence confirms the action items prevented or reduced recurrence?
